Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CashDividend

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CashDividend
public class CashDividend extends Object
CashDividend - Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCashDividendCashRate>
    cashRate()
    The rate (raw value, not a percentage, example: 50% will be .5 in this field) at which cash will be disbursed to the shareholder

    Common fields for corporate actions

    fpsl()
    Corresponds to the raw bucket value that denotes a position is allocated to the "fpsl" memo location
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryFree>

    Corresponds to the raw bucket value that denotes a position is allocated to the "free" memo location
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<Boolean>
    longTermGain()
    Corresponds to corporateactions.announcement.capital_gains
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCashDividendPaymentDate>
    paymentDate()
    The anticipated payment date at the depository
    Optional<Boolean>
    qualified()
    Identifies whether dividend income is potentially qualified for the lower maximum individual federal tax rate under the Jobs and Growth Tax Relief Reconciliation Act of 2003
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCashDividendQuantity>
    quantity()
    When ex-date occurs before the record date, quantity will equal the settled date position balance on the position date of the event When ex-date occurs after the record date, quantity will equal the trade date position balance on the position date of the event
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryRecordDate>
    recordDate()
    The date on which positions are recorded in order to calculate entitlement
    Optional<Boolean>
    reinvested()
    Indicates whether the cash dividend was reinvested
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCashDividendSettled>
    settled()
    Corresponds to the position's settled quantity
    Optional<Boolean>
    substitutePayment()
    Indicates whether the corporate action event is a substitute payment
    Optional<Subtype>
    subtype()
    Corresponds to the subtype of corporaction type
    String
    toString()

      public Optional<Boolean> qualified()
      Identifies whether dividend income is potentially qualified for the lower maximum individual federal tax rate under the Jobs and Growth Tax Relief Reconciliation Act of 2003

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryCashDividendQuantity> quantity()
      When ex-date occurs before the record date, quantity will equal the settled date position balance on the position date of the event When ex-date occurs after the record date, quantity will equal the trade date position balance on the position date of the event

    • recordDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntryRecordDate> recordDate()
      The date on which positions are recorded in order to calculate entitlement
